title: March 2025 Catch Limit Review
body: "There are no catch limit changes proposed for March. Since the last catch limit review, we have changed the following catch limits due to requests from industry:  Overview of Catch limit Changes  Under-10 meter vessels     Stock by Area January 2025 January 2025     Small-eyed Ray - 7fg 0.5t     0.75t      Sole - 7fg       1.25t     2.0t      Herring - Area 4c7d   50t     2000t      Skates & Rays6a-b & 7a-c, e-k (excluding undulate ray in area 7e)   10t     15t        Over-10 meter vessels (non sector)     Stock by Area January 2025 January 2025      Small-eyed Ray - 7fg 0.5t     0.75t          Sector vessels     Stock by Area January 2025 January 2025     Small-eyed Ray - 7fg 0.5t     0.75t        If you have any concerns or suggested changes, please contact us using the details below:  Katie James: 07747638655  Jacob Bestwick: 07469443840  inshorequotamanager@marinemanagement.org.uk "
